title: Royal Walk Windproof Umbrella Black Large 54 Inch Automatic Open for 2 Persons Stormproof for Men Women Classic Wooden Handle Lightweight Waterproof Durable Strong 16 Ribs Travel Golf Unisex 120cm
features: ✔️ ULTRA STRONG WINDPROOF FRAME CONSTRUCTION – Do you need a strong umbrella that should withstand the test of toughest weather and storms? Royal Walk have some of strongest and most endurable umbrellas available to buy right now! Aluminum Frame and 16 fiberglass ribs, comfortable handle. Get our durable and at the same time lightweight Large Royal Walk Automatic Umbrella now

✔️ AUTO OPEN WITH A STYLISH WOODEN HANDLE - CLASSIC UNISEX BLACK Umbrella with an automatic opening system at the touch of a button. The curved stylish wooden handle brings comfort and supports you while walking!

✔️ BIG ENOUGH FOR TWO – With its 39 inches (99cm) length and 47 inches (120cm) in diameter Royal Walk large golf umbrella windproof and rain proof will keep you and your ladies safe from the wet rainy British weather. You can rest assure that when you leave your home you will go back dry!

✔️ CARRY SLEEVE WITH SHOULDER STRAP – Our Umbrellas for women and mens are easy to transport and keep. Every Compact Royal Walk umbrella comes with a black matching carry shoulder strap branded sleeve.

✔️ 2 YEAR FULL INTERNATIONAL WARRANTY. Every Royal Walk travel umbrella comes with a 2 years International Warranty against defects. If you have any questions or suggestions you are also welcome to contact our customer service.

☂️ RAIN REMINDER APP included - ALWAYS BE INFORMED and NEVER GET CAUGHT IN THE RAIN AGAIN - our one of a kind distinguished type of weather app, gives you the opportunity to set receiving notifications when there is a possibility to rain, and it will gently remind you to take your umbrella with you.
description: Product Description What makes Royal Walk a desired and unique umbrella? There is no special secret about it. Using the best quality materials, luxurious design, and key attention to detail - this makes it outstanding! Get one Royal Walk umbrella and you will feel the difference within a second. Large Canopy Umbrella - Classic, Beautiful and Stylish Do you need an umbrella that can withstand the toughest weather and storms? Royal Walk has some of the strongest and most endurable umbrellas available to buy right now. ROYAL WALK - THE CLASSY STYLE YOU NEED! ULTRA STRONG WINDPROOF FRAME CONSTRUCTION & SUPER FAST DRYING UMBRELLA Enforced Aluminum Frame and 16 fiberglass ribs , comfortable handle. Get our durable and at the same time lightweight Large Royal Walk Umbrella now. Soft & Lightweight 190T high-density water repellent fabric keeps you dry and protected from the rain. Rain drops just slip aside. BIG ENOUGH FOR TWO With its 39 inches (99cm) length and 47 inches (120cm) in diameter, the Royal Walk Large Umbrella will keep you and your lover safe from the wet rainy British weather. You can rest assured that when you leave your home you will go back dry! AUTO OPEN WITH A STYLISH WOODEN HANDLE and CARRY SLEEVE WITH SHOULDER STRAP CLASSIC BLACK GOLF STICK UNISEX Umbrella with an automatic opening system at the touch of a button. The curved stylish wooden handle brings comfort and supports you while walking! Royal Walk Large Umbrella comes with a black matching carry shoulder strap branded sleeve. Easy to carry, compact and elegant when folded in the sleeve. SUPER FAST DRYING, LARGE ENOUGH FOR 2, UV-PROTECTED! LARGE ENOUGH TO KEEP YOU DRY Larger Canopy More ribs - more stability Keeps you and your beloved one safe from the rain RAIN REMINDER MOBILE APP & FREE LIFETIME SUBSCRIBTION ALWAYS BE INFORMED and NEVER GET CAUGHT IN THE RAIN AGAIN -our weather app features smart forecasts and intelligent alerts so you’ll never forget to take your Royal Walk Umbrella when it rains. Customizable Notifications - Set a "Morning" and "Evening" notification at a chosen time of the day to let you know if it is possible to rain. The App will gently REMIND you to take your umbrella with you when needed. LARGE, WATERPROOF & UV-PROTECTED Large Brolly for 2 Windproof Waterproof UV-protection Royal Walk Luxury line Comfortable Natural Wood handle Do you need a Large Windproof Stylish Umbrella, big enough for 2 people? Our Royal Walk Big Umbrella is the one you need!! Ultra Strong Windproof Construction Supported by Black Aluminum Frame , 16 fiberglass ribs, and a fancy comfortable wooden J-curved handle. This is a great umbrella windproof compact, perfect for travel, golf and it is a perfect addition to your business outfit. Solid but Lightweight What will make you impressed is how LIGHTWEIGHT (only 625 grams) and at the same time SOLID this mens umbrella is. The Royal Walk Compact Umbrella comes with a Black SHOULDER STRAP CARRY SLEEVE , so you don't have to worry about transportation. It is very compact and elegant when folded in the sleeve. Packing list: 1 x Umbrella 1 x Royal Walk Branded Shoulder Strap Sleeve Royal Walk Large Umbrella Specifications: Automatically open and manually close Black aluminum frame and 16 durable fiberglass ribs Sturdy wooden J-handle Carry sleeve with a shoulder strap -Black branded pouch for slinging the umbrella and easy transport Measures 39 inches (99cm) long and 47 inches (120cm) in diameter and 54"(138cm) when open arch Material: Premium 190T Pongee fabric The Luxury Has A Name - ROYAL WALK Big Size Canopy With its amazing size of 39 inches (99cm) in length and 47 inches (120cm) in diameter, our Royal Walk Large Stick Umbrella is BIG ENOUGH FOR TWO and will keep you and your family safe from the rain. The Big Size Canopy is made from is high-density water repellent Premium 190T Pongee fabric material that makes it easy for raindrops to slip. RAIN REMINDER APP included - Do not get caught in the rain again - our one-of-a-kind distinguished type of weather app, gives you the opportunity to set receiving notifications when there is a possibility to rain, and it will gently remind you to take your umbrella with you. *** Instructions on how to get your Rain Reminder App you will receive with a small flyer card attached to every Royal Walk umbrella. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to write back to us anytime.
